basic_details.job_title: APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 135 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Southern Power Distribution Company of AP Ltd (APSPDCL)
basic_details.short_information: The Southern Power Distribution Company of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APSPDCL) has released the APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 notification (No. 1/2026, dated 25 June 2026) for 135 Assistant Executive Engineer vacancies across Electrical, Civil, and Telecom disciplines. Engineering graduates aged 18 to 42 years can apply online from 30 June 2026 to 20 July 2026 at apspdcl.in or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in. Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000 during the probation period of two years.

important_dates.objection filing window: Within 7 days of initial key release
important_dates.merit list announcement: 7 days after final key (tentatively September last week 2026)

application_fee.details: The application fee for APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable online through the Payment Gateway between 30 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. There is no fee exemption mentioned for any category in this notification. | Fee is paid through the online Payment Gateway only. On successful payment, the candidate receives a Journal Number which is required to proceed with the online application. Receiving a Journal Number does not mean the application is complete - the full form must still be submitted. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Category Minimum Age Maximum Age General (OC/EWS) 18 years 42 years SC / ST / BC 18 years 47 years Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) 18 years 52 years | Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST/BC candidates get a 5-year relaxation (maximum age 47), while PwBD candidates get a 10-year relaxation (maximum age 52). Age is calculated as of 1 July 2026 .

qualification.details: The APSPDCL AEE 2026 eligibility requirements are post-specific for educational qualifications. All candidates must be fully qualified and in possession of all required certificates as on 20 July 2026 (the last date of application).

salary_details.details: The APSPDCL AEE 2026 pay structure and bond conditions are clearly defined and candidates must accept these before applying. During the 2-year probation period, selected candidates receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000. | After successful probation declaration, candidates are placed on the regular pay scale: ₹86,245 – ₹2,900 – ₹1,00,745 – ₹3,350 – ₹1,17,495 – ₹3,725 – ₹1,36,120 – ₹4,155 – ₹1,56,895 – ₹4,550 – ₹1,79,645 – ₹4,850 – ₹2,03,895 – ₹5,020 – ₹2,08,915 (RPS-2022). | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now | Every appointed candidate must execute a Service Bond on Non-Judicial Stamp Paper of ₹110 at the time of joining. Key bond terms: | Candidates must serve APSPDCL for a minimum of 5 years after probation (total 7 years from joining). Original certificates (Degree, Date of Birth, Community) must be deposited with APSPDCL for the entire 7-year bond period. If certificates are needed during the bond period, a security deposit of ₹1,00,000 must be paid first, refunded upon return of certificates. Candidates leaving during the 2-year probation must refund all emoluments received plus ₹5,00,000 as liquidated damages. Candidates resigning after probation but before completing 5 years of post-probation service must pay ₹10,00,000 as liquidated damages. | All selected candidates must be willing to work in field offices (Operation Sections/MRT/DPE/Construction Divisions), preferably in rural and remote locations, for a continuous period of not less than 5 years from the date of initial appointment. No transfer to office or headquarters postings will be entertained during this period. Promotion eligibility and SGP increments apply only after completion of this field tenure.

selection_process: Category Minimum Marks Required
OC / EWS 40%
BC 35%
SC / ST / PwBD 30%
The APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 selection is entirely based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by certificate verification. There is no interview stage for this recruitment.
Step 1 - Computer Based Test (CBT): Conducted from 22 to 29 August 2026
duration 3 hours
in English only. Total marks: 100. No negative marking.
Step 2 - Initial Key Publication: Released on the 2nd day after the last exam. Candidates can file objections online within 7 days.
Step 3 - Final Key Publication: Released 7 days after the objection window closes.
Step 4 - Merit List: Published 7 days after the final key (tentatively September last week 2026)
based on normalized CBT scores.
Step 5 - Certificate Verification: Candidates in the merit list (1:1 ratio against vacancies) are called for document verification. Absence or ineligibility at this stage leads to disqualification.
Step 6 - Provisional Selection List: Prepared from candidates found eligible at certificate verification
in strict order of merit with reservation rules applied.
Step 7 - Appointment Orders: Issued to candidates in the final selection list
subject to physical fitness and character verification.

Merely securing the minimum qualifying marks does not guarantee a call for certificate verification. Final selection depends on the overall merit rank and availability of vacancies in the respective category.
If two or more candidates score equal marks in the CBT
the older candidate is ranked higher. If age is also equal
the candidate who acquired the prescribed educational qualification earlier gets the higher rank.
Since the CBT may be conducted in multiple shifts
a normalization procedure will be applied to equalize scores across shifts before preparing the merit list.

exam_pattern.details: The APSPDCL AEE 2026 exam is 100 marks with the following distribution for all three posts: | There is no negative marking in the CBT for any of the three posts. | AEE/Electrical (70 marks): Electric Circuits, Electrical Machines, Power Systems, Utilization & Control Systems, Measurements, Analog & Digital Electronics, Power Electronics & Drives. | AEE/Telecom (70 marks): Network Analysis, Fourier Series & Transforms, Electronic Devices & Circuits, Digital Circuits, Linear Control Systems, Transmission Lines & Antennas, Maxwell's Equations, Waveguides, Communication Systems, Microprocessors. | AEE/Civil (70 marks): Strength of Materials, Reinforced Concrete, Soil Mechanics, Steel Structures, Fluid Mechanics & Machinery, Foundation Engineering.

syllabus.details: The APSPDCL AEE 2026 exam is 100 marks with the following distribution for all three posts: | Section Marks Core Subject (Post-specific) 70 Quantitative Aptitude 8 General Awareness 7 Reasoning & General Intelligence 5 English Language & Comprehension 5 Computer Knowledge 5 Total 100 | There is no negative marking in the CBT for any of the three posts.

how_to_apply: All APSPDCL AEE 2026 applications must be submitted online only through the official Common Recruitment Portal. No offline or postal applications are accepted under any circumstances.
Visit https://apspdcl.in or https://apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 30 June 2026 (10:00 AM).
Register using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number. An OTP will be sent to verify your identity. The mobile number used must be linked to your Aadhaar.
Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 through the Payment Gateway (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI). Note your Journal Number upon successful payment.
Log in using your registration credentials and fill in all required fields - educational qualifications, academic details, personal information, and utility/zone preferences.

Upload documents: Recent passport-size photograph, scanned signature, and all relevant certificates (caste certificate, PwBD SADAREM certificate if applicable, EWS certificate, study/residence certificate for local candidature).
Exercise your preferences for participating power utilities (APTRANSCO, APEPDCL, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, APGENCO) and zones. These preferences are final and cannot be changed after submission.
Submit the application before 23:59 hrs on 20 July 2026. Incomplete applications will be summarily rejected.
Download your Hall Ticket 7 days before the examination from the official portal.
Important: Candidates currently serving in Government/Autonomous Body/Local Body/Aided Institution must submit a No Objection Certificate (NoC) from their employer along with the online application.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online, pay the fee, and upload all certificates is 20 July 2026 by 23:59 hrs. No extension has been announced.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in APSPDCL AEE Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: APSPDCL has notified 135 total vacancies - 125 for AEE/Electrical (including 1 OC-Women backlog), 6 for AEE/Civil, and 4 for AEE/Telecom.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for APSPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable online through the Payment Gateway. Fees once paid are non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 42 years as on 1 July 2026. SC/ST/BC candidates get a 5-year relaxation (up to 47 years), and PwBD candidates get a 10-year relaxation (up to 52 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for APSPDCL AEE posts?
faq.answer: During the 2-year probation period, selected candidates receive ₹75,000 per month (consolidated). After probation, the regular RPS-2022 pay scale applies, starting at ₹86,245.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for APSPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks (3 hours, English medium, no negative marking), followed by certificate verification. There is no interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the APSPDCL AEE 2026 exam scheduled?
faq.answer: The CBT is scheduled from 22 August to 29 August 2026. Hall tickets will be available for download 7 days before the exam date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a service bond for APSPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Selected candidates must execute a service bond committing to serve for a minimum of 5 years after probation (total 7 years). Leaving during probation attracts ₹5 lakh in liquidated damages; resigning within the 5-year post-probation period attracts ₹10 lakh.

faq.question: Q9. What are the exam centers for APSPDCL AEE CBT 2026?
faq.answer: The CBT will be held at 47 cities in Andhra Pradesh and select centers in Hyderabad, Khammam, Bengaluru, Chennai, and Berhampore. Candidates must appear at their allotted center.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a common exam for all AP power utilities?
faq.answer: Yes. The APSPDCL AEE 2026 exam is a Common Recruitment Examination jointly conducted for APTRANSCO, APEPDCL, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, and APGENCO. Candidates apply once, exercise utility and zone preferences, and are allotted based on merit, reservation, and preference order. Preferences cannot be changed after submission.You said: APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF - h2 is missing
